task_description: Build a complete luxury menswear website for Amaka Fashion Atelier from scratch. The site features a mobile-first responsive design with emerald green, gold, black, and cream color scheme. It includes Home, Collections, About, and Contact pages, a Dapper AI chatbot, WhatsApp integration, and luxury animations. Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

verification.summary: pnpm build completes successfully. All 4 routes (/, /about, /collections, /contact) are statically generated without errors. TypeScript compilation passes. Code review issues fixed: URL encoding, chatbot intent matching, dead-end links, aria-expanded accessibility.
